description: Commentary topics for Media Coach SimHub Plugin. Each topic defines telemetry triggers and on-screen prompts.

topics.title: Force Feedback Feel
topics.description: Comment on how the wheel is communicating grip, load, and car behavior through force feedback.

triggers.context: Sudden torque spike often means curb hit or snap oversteer — natural moment to talk FFB feel
High lateral load = good moment to talk about what the wheel is communicating

commentaryPrompts: Talk about what the wheel is telling you right now — is the FFB communicating grip loss early or surprising you?
How is the force feedback feeling through this section? Is it helping or fighting you?

topics.title: Pedal Feel & Brake Pressure
topics.description: Comment on pedal hardware response, brake pressure curves, or throttle feel.

triggers.context: Heavy braking zone — natural moment to discuss pedal feel and brake pressure
ABS activation is a direct cue to discuss brake hardware and bias

commentaryPrompts: Talk about your brake pedal — are you getting good feel and modulation going into that corner?
That's a big braking zone. How are your pedals handling the load comparison to real-world feel?

topics.title: Steering Wheel Setup
topics.description: Comment on steering wheel hardware, quick-release, or button mapping.

triggers.context: Start of race is a natural time to intro your rig setup
Extreme steering angle (correction) — comment on wheel feel during correction

commentaryPrompts: Quick shout — talk about your wheel setup and why you chose this wheelbase for this sim.
Big correction there. Talk about how the wheel feels when you're catching slides like that.

topics.title: FOV & Visual Setup
topics.description: Comment on field of view, screen setup, visual effects, or graphical feel.

triggers.context: High speed sections — good moment to comment on visual speed feel and FOV perception
Race start — viewers want to know your screen/FOV setup

commentaryPrompts: Talk about your FOV setup — does it feel natural at this speed, or is it something you're still dialling in?
At this pace, talk about how the visual presentation of the sim feels versus a real car.

topics.title: Engine & Tire Sounds
topics.description: Comment on engine audio, tire squeal, or overall sound design of the sim.

triggers.context: High RPM — engine note is prominent, natural time to comment on audio
Lateral load means tires are working hard — good cue for tire sound commentary

commentaryPrompts: Listen to that engine note — talk about how well the sim captures the sound of this car.
You can hear the tires working. Talk about the audio feedback you get from the sound design here.

topics.title: Sim Performance & Feel
topics.description: Comment on frame rate, physics feel, or how the simulation compares to reality.

triggers.context: Track conditions changing is a natural cue to discuss sim fidelity
Weather change — talk about how the sim handles dynamic conditions

commentaryPrompts: Talk about how this sim feels right now — does it feel believable or are there things that break the immersion?
Compare the physics here to other sims you've driven. What does this one do better or worse?

topics.title: Tire Temperatures
topics.description: Comment on tire temperature status and its effect on grip and lap time.

triggers.context: Start of lap — tires may be cold, good moment to discuss warm-up
After several laps tires are in operating window or degrading — comment on condition

commentaryPrompts: Talk about your tire temps right now — are they in the window or still building heat?
How are the tires feeling after these laps? Are you getting consistent grip or starting to lose it?

topics.title: Car Balance — Oversteer / Understeer
topics.description: Comment on car balance, push or rotation through corners.

triggers.context: Lateral grip loss — possible oversteer snap or push moment
Large angle correction — oversteer catch
High yaw rate indicates rotation beyond intent — oversteer or spin

commentaryPrompts: Talk about the balance there — was that a push on entry or the rear stepping out on exit?
Is the car rotating how you want it, or is it fighting you through the corners?

topics.title: Traction Control
topics.description: Comment on TC activation, settings, or philosophy on using aids.

triggers.context: TC setting changed via cockpit — natural moment to explain the adjustment
Full throttle application — chance to discuss TC and wheelspin management

commentaryPrompts: Talk about your TC setting and how it's affecting your exit speed out of the slow corners.
Are you running with TC on or off? Talk about how that changes the way you drive the car.

topics.title: Braking
topics.description: Comment on brake performance, bias, ABS, and braking points.

triggers.context: Heavy braking event
ABS is firing
Very heavy deceleration — significant braking zone

commentaryPrompts: Talk through your braking there — where's your braking point and how are you managing the threshold?
How's the brake balance feeling? Are you getting rear lock-up or is it stable into the corner?

topics.title: Shifting & Gearbox
topics.description: Comment on shift speed, auto vs manual, paddle feel, or gear selection.

triggers.context: Multiple gear changes in quick succession — sequential shifting sequence
Near redline — upshift moment

commentaryPrompts: Talk about the gearbox in this car — is it forgiving or do you have to be precise with timing?
Are you driving this car differently in terms of gear selection versus your usual approach?

topics.title: Fuel Load & Strategy
topics.description: Comment on fuel level, consumption, and strategic decisions.

triggers.context: Low fuel — potential pitstop decision approaching
Heavy fuel load at race start — affects car balance

commentaryPrompts: Talk about your fuel strategy here — how many laps do you have left and when are you planning to pit?
Heavy fuel at the start makes the car feel very different. Talk about how you're managing that.

topics.title: ERS / Hybrid System
topics.description: Comment on hybrid system deployment, regeneration, and management strategy.

triggers.context: ERS battery level is changing significantly
MGUK deploying power — ERS boost active

commentaryPrompts: Talk about the hybrid system in this car — how are you managing deployment and regen?
ERS is a whole extra layer of strategy here. Talk the viewer through how you're thinking about it.

topics.title: DRS
topics.description: Comment on DRS availability and usage.

triggers.context: DRS available
DRS active

commentaryPrompts: DRS is available. Talk about how much it's actually helping your straight-line speed here.
How significant is DRS on this track — is it decisive for overtaking or just a small advantage?

topics.title: Lap Time & Delta
topics.description: Comment on lap time performance, improvement, or delta to best.

triggers.context: Running more than half a second ahead of personal best — hot lap
Running more than 1 second behind best — traffic or setup issue
Just set a new personal best lap

commentaryPrompts: Talk through your lap time target — are you where you expected to be pace-wise?
What's costing you time right now — is it a specific corner or something systemic with the setup?

topics.title: Overtaking & Being Passed
topics.description: Comment on passes made or received and the tactical decisions involved.

triggers.context: Player gained a position — just made a pass
Player lost a position — was just passed

commentaryPrompts: Talk through that move — where did you see the opportunity and how did you execute it?
You lost a position there. What happened — was it a mistake, traffic, or were they just faster?

topics.title: Mistakes & Incidents
topics.description: Comment on driving errors, incidents, or off-track moments.

triggers.context: Incident count went up — contact or track limits violation
Car left the track surface
Big vertical acceleration spike — curb, kerb, or contact

commentaryPrompts: Talk through that — what went wrong and what would you do differently next time?
That mistake cost you. Break it down: was it over-confidence, misreading the corner, or a setup issue?

topics.title: Traffic & Netcode
topics.description: Comment on other drivers, close racing, or netcode/connection quality.

triggers.context: Another car is very close — within ~2% of track distance

commentaryPrompts: Talk about racing in traffic here — how are you managing the risks vs the rewards of being aggressive?
What's your read on the driver ahead — are they consistent or are you seeing mistakes you can exploit?

topics.title: Flags, Penalties & Track Limits
topics.description: Comment on flags received, track limit warnings, or black flag events.

triggers.context: Yellow flag is out
Black flag — penalty
Incident count increasing — track limits or contact penalty

commentaryPrompts: Yellow flag. Talk about how it affects your strategy — do you push or back off and manage position?
Talk about the track limits rules here — are they fair, too strict, or not strict enough?

topics.title: Pit Stop Strategy
topics.description: Comment on pit stop timing, service, and strategic decisions.

triggers.context: Player is entering pit lane
Very low fuel — pit stop imminent

commentaryPrompts: You're pitting. Talk through the decision — timing, what you're taking, and what position you expect to come out in.
How's the pit stop strategy shaping up? Are you on the same strategy as your rivals or going a different way?

topics.title: Session Start & Car Setup
topics.description: Comment on setup choices, car configuration, and expectations going into the session.

triggers.context: First lap of the session
Race session beginning

commentaryPrompts: Talk through your setup for this session — what did you prioritize and why?
What are your goals for this session — is it about pace, consistency, or learning the car?

topics.title: Weather & Track Conditions
topics.description: Comment on track temperature, weather changes, or wet/drying conditions.

triggers.context: Session declared wet
Track temperature changed significantly

commentaryPrompts: Talk about the track conditions right now — how is it affecting your approach and the limits of the car?
The weather is a factor here. Talk through how you're adapting your driving to the conditions.
